ItacPersonItem.Notes: Inglese and Leoni were printers active in Palermo from 1659 to 1699. See Niccolò Domenico Evola, Ricerche storiche sulla tipografia siciliana, 1940 (BL Shelfmark: General Reference Collection P.P.6476.en.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
